greeting: The battlefield isn't won by strength alone.
Let's see how well you can read the path ahead.
blunder: I spent three moves setting that trap. You sprinted into it like it was offering free gold.
I've tracked drunk bandits through a sandstorm. Their plans made more sense than yours.
Your strategy seems to begin with hope and end with regret.
check: Check. You never saw it coming, did you?
capture: Scouts spot weaknesses. Yours was visible from miles away.
promotion: A promotion. Unlike your king, at least one thing is advancing.
default: I spent years scouting the kingdom's borders.
I've crossed forests, deserts, and frozen mountains.
While others chased promotions, I chased horizons.
I learned that information wins more wars than steel.
The world is much larger than the capital.
victory: You focus too much on what's in front of you. Learn to see further.
Have you considered a career in turnip observation? The turnips might object, but it's worth trying.
defeat: They'll serve you well in the battles ahead.
